name: Keyword Context Injector
description: Injects reference documents into agent context when conversation keywords match. Supports TTL-based unloading, token budget caps, and priority sorting. Reduces boot payload by loading docs on-demand instead of at startup.

docsRoot.description: Root directory for reference documents. Paths in the keyword map are resolved relative to this directory. Defaults to {workspaceDir}.

maxTotalChars.description: Maximum total characters of injected context per turn (~15K tokens at 60000 chars).

maxConcurrentDocs.description: Maximum number of documents injected simultaneously.

mapReloadMs.description: How often to check for keyword map changes (milliseconds).
